title: select_with_fee iterative convergence is correct; do not replace with 2-pass approach
description: tx_builder.rs select_with_fee() uses an iterative loop. zip317_fee is monotone non-decreasing with input count, notes are finite, so the loop terminates. A 2-pass approach fails when the second pass selects more notes, increasing the fee, which then requires more notes. The loop handles this correctly. Do not simplify to 2 passes.
